prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含2021–2023年理科）最低位次分别为约7010名→3448名→2606名→1652名→1536名，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近5年累计前 移约5474名，竞争热度持续攀升；2025年基准位次约1536名；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划：2021年70人→2022年58人→2023年58人→2024年39人→2025年37人→202 6年61人，2026年较2025年大幅扩招约24人（+64.9%），扩招幅度显著，将有效缓解竞争压力，推动最低位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学为985工程、211工 程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第28名，属全国顶尖理工类高校，近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，学校层次对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高 考周期声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常舆情），但抖音热度为较热（总排名第55位，综合热度约56万），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；历史投档异常信号为低关 注（2023年电信学部曾出现断档舆情，2024年有投档线异常传闻），整体舆情对报考心理影响有限；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共10个：化学工程与技术A+、力学 A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、生物医学工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-，优势学科数量多且覆盖该校主要招生专业，对 考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校工科优势高度匹配；甘肃省2026年普通高考考生总数 约218700人（较2025年物理类+历史类合计约179817人增加约21.6%），考生规模大幅增长将加剧整体竞争；大连理工大学 位于辽宁省大连市，非甘肃省本省高校，但作为东北地区顶尖985，对西北地区考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在甘肃省招生计划占比较小（2025年物理类37人），扩招后仍属小规 模招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1536名、2026年大幅扩招64.9%（推动位次后移）、甘肃省考生总数增长约21.6%（加剧竞争）、学校层次高且 优势学科丰富（维持吸引力）等多因素，在此基础上考虑考生规模增长带来的额外竞争压力，微调后预测最低位次约2164名，区间1917–2411名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science Category from 2021 to 2023) were approximately 7010 → 3448 → 2606 → 1652 → 1536, showing a continuous upward trend (rank numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative upward shift of about 5474 positions over the past 5 years, indicating rising competition intensity; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1536; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for Physics Category: 2021: 70 → 2022: 58 → 2023: 58 → 2024: 39 → 2025: 37 → 2026: 61, with a significant expansion of about 24 students (+64.9%) in 2026 compared to 2025, which will effectively alleviate competition pressure and push the minimum ranking downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China, with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years; the university's level continues to strongly attract candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving enrollment gaps or abnormal admission score line incidents), but Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 55th overall, with comprehensive popularity around 560,000), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms; historical abnormal admission signals are low concern (the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering had an enrollment gap incident in 2023, and there were rumors of abnormal admission score lines in 2024), with overall public opinion having limited impact on application psychology; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 10 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, with a large number of advantageous disciplines covering the university's main enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly matching the university's engineering strengths; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is approximately 218,700 (an increase of about 21.6% compared to the total of approximately 179,817 for Physics and History Categories in 2025), with a significant increase in candidate scale intensifying overall competition; Dalian University of Technology is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, not a local university in Gansu Province, but as a top 985 university in Northeast China, it has strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the Northwest region; the university's enrollment plan in Gansu Province accounts for a small proportion (37 students in Physics Category in 2025), and even after expansion, it remains a small-scale enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1536, the significant 64.9% expansion in 2026 (pushing rankings downward), the approximately 21.6% increase in total candidates in Gansu Province (intensifying competition), the high university level and rich advantageous disciplines (maintaining attractiveness), and additionally accounting for the extra competition pressure from candidate scale growth, after fine-tuning, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2164, with a range of 1917–2411.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Discipline Top Talent Program Class)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Regular Class)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (Innovation Class)
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering (New Engineering Top Talent Class)
- Electronic Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical
- Materials
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1917–2411, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1900), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence Master Class, Computer Top Talent Class); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 2400), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1404 名、2026年招生计划持平、甘肃省历史类考生规模增长约20%（加剧竞争）、学校985层次对文科考生仍有吸引力等因素，在此基础上考虑考生规模 增长带来的额外竞争压力，微调后预测最低位次约1424名，区间1262–1586名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024–2025 were approximately 1099 → 1404, with a cumulative backward shift of about 305 positions over the past 2 years, showing a trend of ranking decline; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1404; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for History Category: 2024: 10 students → 2025: 9 students → 2026: 9 students, with 2026 unchanged from 2025, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top national universities; although primarily focused on science and engineering, the 985 level still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (abnormal enrollment gaps or abnormal admission line sentiment), with Douyin popularity being relatively hot (overall ranking 55th), overall public opinion has a neutral to weak impact on application psychology; Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A and other management disciplines have some connection with History Category enrollment majors (Public Affairs Management, Philosophy), but overall there are fewer strong liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Public Affairs Management and Philosophy have generally average social popularity; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025; based on the recent History Category proportion of about 32%, the estimated number of History Category candidates in 2026 is about 70,000, an increase of about 20% from 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition; Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, not a local university, so cross-provincial appeal to Gansu liberal arts candidates is average; the History Category enrollment scale is very small (only 9 students), so regional preference impact is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1404, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, the increase in Gansu Province History Category candidate scale by about 20% (intensifying competition), and the 985 level of the university still having appeal for liberal arts candidates, and taking into account the additional competitive pressure from the increase in candidate scale, after fine-tuning, the predicted minimum ranking is about 1424, with a range of 1262–1586.
